_source: Banking-industry financial indicator rule set, curated from indicators.md (银行业财务报表指标目录). Each rule maps one indicator to its source location and extractor. Adding a rule = editing this JSON; no code change. See docs/indicators-methodology.md for the rendered guide. CSV-sourced indicators are migrated from docs/indicators_position.csv by indicators_csv_migration.migrate (idempotent; re-run after editing the CSV).

_schema.name: indicator name (exact, Chinese)

applies_to.sub_types: [国有大行, 股份制, 城商行, 农商行] or ['*']

_schema.source: {statement, field} for akshare | {selectors:[{company?, section, fallback?}], extractor, schema_hint?} for report | {formula, inputs} for computed
_schema.extractor: llm | python:<name> | auto (report only; auto = llm unless python named)

rules.note: Interest-bearing liabilities.

source.formula: 有息负债 / 资产总计 * 100

rules.name: 流动比率
rules.note: Current ratio.

source.formula: 流动资产合计 / 流动负债合计

source.formula: (流动资产合计 - 存货) / 流动负债合计
